div.h1: ARIES Recovery Matrix: Crash Scenarios & WAL Handling

p.strong: Systematic recovery behavior across six critical crash points

ol.li: Repeat History (Redo): Replay all log records to restore DB state to exact crash point.
Log Progress (Undo): Roll back uncommitted transactions; write CLRs to ensure undo is restartable.
Durability (WAL): Log records must reach stable storage (fsync) before data pages or commit.
